metadata.description: Structured Prompt Generation endpoint for Fibo, Bria's SOTA Open source model.

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for bria/fibo/generate/structured_prompt
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the bria/fibo/generate/structured_prompt queue.

structured_prompt.description: The structured prompt to generate an image from.

examples: A hyper-detailed, ultra-fluffy owl sitting in the trees at night, looking directly at the camera with wide, adorable, expressive eyes. Its feathers are soft and voluminous, catching the cool moonlight with subtle silver highlights. The owl’s gaze is curious and full of charm, giving it a whimsical, storybook-like personality.
prompt.title: Prompt

objects.description: A list of objects in the image to be generated, along with their attributes and relationships to other objects in the image.
objects.title: Objects

text_render.description: A list of text to be rendered in the image.
text_render.title: Text Render

style_medium.description: The style medium of the image to be generated.
style_medium.title: Style Medium

background_setting.description: The background setting of the image to be generated.
background_setting.title: Background Setting

artistic_style.description: The artistic style of the image to be generated.
artistic_style.title: Artistic Style

context.description: The context of the image to be generated.
context.title: Context

photographic_characteristics.description: The photographic characteristics of the image to be generated.

aesthetics.description: The aesthetics of the image to be generated.

short_description.description: A short description of the image to be generated.
short_description.title: Short Description

lighting.description: The lighting of the image to be generated.

number_of_objects.description: The number of objects in the image.
number_of_objects.title: Number Of Objects

clothing.description: The clothing of the object in the image.
clothing.title: Clothing

description.description: A description of the object to be generated.
description.title: Description

relative_size.description: The relative size of the object in the image.
relative_size.title: Relative Size

skin_tone_and_texture.description: The skin tone and texture of the object in the image.
skin_tone_and_texture.title: Skin Tone And Texture

expression.description: The expression of the object in the image.
expression.title: Expression

action.description: The action of the object in the image.
action.title: Action

pose.description: The pose of the object in the image.
pose.title: Pose

appearance_details.description: The appearance details of the object.
appearance_details.title: Appearance Details

gender.description: The gender of the object in the image.
gender.title: Gender

relationship.description: The relationship of the object to other objects in the image.
relationship.title: Relationship

location.description: The location of the object in the image.
location.title: Location

orientation.description: The orientation of the object in the image.
orientation.title: Orientation

shape_and_color.description: The shape and color of the object.
shape_and_color.title: Shape And Color

camera_angle.description: The angle of the camera in the image to be generated.
camera_angle.title: Camera Angle

focus.description: The focus in the image to be generated.
focus.title: Focus

lens_focal_length.description: The focal length of the lens in the image to be generated.
lens_focal_length.title: Lens Focal Length

depth_of_field.description: The depth of field in the image to be generated.
depth_of_field.title: Depth Of Field

color_scheme.description: The color scheme of the image to be generated.
color_scheme.title: Color Scheme

mood_atmosphere.description: The mood and atmosphere of the image to be generated.
mood_atmosphere.title: Mood Atmosphere

composition.description: The composition of the image to be generated.
composition.title: Composition

conditions.description: The conditions of the lighting in the image to be generated.
conditions.title: Conditions

direction.description: The direction of the lighting in the image to be generated.
direction.title: Direction

shadows.description: The shadows in the image to be generated.
shadows.title: Shadows

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.

metadata.description: Convert plain text into Fibo-Lite's transparent JSON-structured prompts - Bria's unique controllability layer that no closed model offers. Built for agentic and enterprise workflows.

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for bria/fibo-lite/generate/structured_prompt
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the bria/fibo-lite/generate/structured_prompt queue.

prompt.title: Prompt
examples: Oil painting of a fluffy, wide-eyed cat sitting upright, holding a small wooden sign reading "Feed Me." Rich textures, dramatic brushstrokes, warm tones, and vintage charm.

seed.description: Seed for the random number generator.
seed.title: Seed

background_setting.description: Describe the overall environment, setting, or background, including any notable background elements.
background_setting.title: Background Setting

short_description.description: A concise summary of the image content, 200 words maximum.
short_description.title: Short Description

subject_emotions.description: Explicitly describe any visible emotions or expressions on subjects.
subject_emotions.title: Subject Emotions

context.description: Provide any additional context that helps understand the image better.
context.title: Context

text_render.description: List of text renders in the image.
text_render.title: Text Render

artistic_style.description: describe specific artistic characteristics, 3 words maximum.
artistic_style.title: Artistic Style

style_medium.description: Identify the artistic style or medium.
style_medium.title: Style Medium

focus.description: E.g., 'sharp focus on subject', 'soft focus', 'motion blur'.
focus.title: Focus

ObjectDescription.title: ObjectDescription
ObjectDescription.description: Detailed object description with all attributes.

number_of_objects.description: The number of objects in the cluster.
number_of_objects.title: Number Of Objects

action.description: Describe the action of the human.
action.title: Action

gender.description: Describe the gender of the human.
gender.title: Gender

orientation.description: Describe the orientation of the human.
orientation.title: Orientation

skin_tone_and_texture.description: Describe the skin tone and texture.
skin_tone_and_texture.title: Skin Tone And Texture

shape_and_color.description: Describe the basic shape and dominant color.
shape_and_color.title: Shape And Color

relationship.description: Describe the relationship between the object and the other objects in the image.
relationship.title: Relationship

TextRender.title: TextRender
TextRender.description: Text rendering information in the image.

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.

metadata.description: Structured Instructions Generation endpoint for Fibo Edit, Bria's newest editing model.

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for bria/fibo-edit/edit/structured_instruction
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the bria/fibo-edit/edit/structured_instruction queue.

mask_url.title: Mask Url
mask_url.description: Reference image mask (file or URL). Optional.

sync_mode.title: Sync Mode
sync_mode.description: If true, returns the image directly in the response (increases latency).

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.
